title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
